mechanics.excerpt: For example_ character who had already taken the University Path and Sciences Major Subpath returns to the University Path_ that character would skip direct- Iy t0 another Major Subpath or to the Medical or Field Science School Subpath: Modifiers to character' Attribute minimums and thresh- olds only apply the first time character takes path or sub- path; disregard them o subsequent passes Likewise traits granted by path or subpath are only bestowed once even character follows the same path several times; Traits earned through events are a exception to this rule_ By contrast; character who repeats path or subpath does receive any Skill Points granted by it.
